summary: Completed comprehensive testing of My Car Garage PWA. All critical features working correctly: Registration/Login, Add Car with images, DELETE CAR, and Service Records. Backend API 100% pass rate (24/24 tests). Frontend UI fully functional.

issues: Brand/Model dropdown overlays can cause click interception. Use force=True or Escape key to close dropdowns reliably.

passed_tests: DELETE CAR - CRITICAL TEST PASSED - Returns 200, car removed from DB
Car image API - Returns correct Pexels/Unsplash URLs for different brands
Different brands get different images (Skoda, BMW, Porsche)
Service record creation - Oil change form
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE car functionality CONFIRMED WORKING - API returns 200, car properly removed
Car images use curated Pexels/Unsplash URLs that return HTTP 200
Code structure is clean with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements properly trigger API calls
test_credentials: Multiple test users created during testing (auto-generated emails)
seed_data_creation: Test cars created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: Registration, Login, Add Car (Skoda/BMW brands tested with correct images), DELETE car (trash icon on detail page), Service records. DELETE functionality confirmed working - console logs show 'API: Delete response status: 200' and 'Car deleted successfully'. Images loading from Pexels URLs (HTTP 200). App is fully functional in Czech language.

rca_of_the_issue.image_loading_status: WORKING - Using curated Pexels/Unsplash images that return HTTP 200
